'''rarufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldcomer|oldcomer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldcomer|oldcomer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rarufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rærifith|rærifith]] || [[word:rærifij|rærifij]] || [[word:rærifish|rærifish]] || [[word:rærifi|rærifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rarurufuth|rarurufuth]] || [[word:rarurufuj|rarurufuj]] || [[word:rarurufush|rarurufush]] || [[word:rarurufu|rarurufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarufuth|rarufuth]] || [[word:rarufuj|rarufuj]] || [[word:rarufush|rarufush]] || [[word:rarufu|rarufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:raruffuth|raruffuth]] || [[word:raruffuj|raruffuj]] || [[word:raruffush|raruffush]] || [[word:raruffuf|raruffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarufuthu|rarufuthu]] || [[word:rarufuju|rarufuju]] || [[word:rarufushu|rarufushu]] || [[word:rarufuku|rarufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarufuth|rarufuth]] || [[word:rarufuj|rarufuj]] || [[word:rarufush|rarufush]] || [[word:rarufu|rarufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarufuthul|rarufuthul]] || [[word:rarufujul|rarufujul]] || [[word:rarufushul|rarufushul]] || [[word:rarufukul|rarufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarufuthuthu|rarufuthuthu]] || [[word:rarufujuju|rarufujuju]] || [[word:rarufushushu|rarufushushu]] || [[word:rarufuku|rarufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarufuthun|rarufuthun]] || [[word:rarufujun|rarufujun]] || [[word:rarufushun|rarufushun]] || [[word:rarufukun|rarufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarufuthuoro|rarufuthuoro]] || [[word:rarufujuoro|rarufujuoro]] || [[word:rarufushuoro|rarufushuoro]] || [[word:rarufukuoro|rarufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
